channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] New invasive insect found in 16 Florida counties spreads to Polk County ranch
item.description: A tiny insect recently discovered in Florida is creating a big problem for ranchers in Polk County. The rancher said he began noticing sections of pasture at Crooked Lake Ranch in Frostproof.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] More than 1,500 Duke Energy customers lose power in Clearwater
item.description: More than 1,500 Duke Energy customers in the Clearwater area lost power Tuesday night as utility crews worked to determine the cause and restore service.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Man injured in shooting at Lakeland apartment complex
item.description: A man was shot at a Lakeland apartment complex Tuesday evening and was taken to a hospital with injuries that police said appear to be non-life-threatening.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] USF student creates jewelry sensor to detect drink-spiking drugs
item.description: A former University of South Florida beach volleyball player is developing jewelry with a sensor designed to warn people when dangerous drugs have been slipped into their drinks.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Family remembers 3-year-old victim in murder case: 'She was smart, funny, and beautiful'
item.description: A Hillsborough County family is remembering a three-year-old girl after investigators say she died at the hands of her caregiver.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Driver loses control of SUV before slamming into Carrollwood restaurant, 3 vehicles
item.description: An SUV driver lost control and crashed into a Carrollwood restaurant Tuesday afternoon after hitting three other vehicles in the parking lot.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] St. Pete Beach parking: Business owners say higher rates drive customers away
item.description: Higher parking rates at St. Pete Beach are drawing criticism from local business owners who say the increased costs are keeping visitors away. One owner has launched an online petition urging city leaders to revisit the parking policy before more businesses are affected.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida Lottery Mega Millions, Fantasy 5 results for July 21, 2026
